title: 宝塚記念の後に・『つまんない』

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Phew... I won!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Heh... Haha... I don't believe it... I was right. Of
course I was.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I plotted it all out... and I won! To think I was so
worried—

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: (Wait a second... Something's off...)

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Oh, that's right.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
They lose, they learn something from it, and then
they improve. It's like science at this point.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Even if someone else is ahead, they close the gap
little by little. Next time, I might—

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Congratulations, Sky. It pains me to say it, but
you did well.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
However, my time is coming! I look forward to
seeing you at the autumn Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
There you'll be honored to face off against the
first-rate Umamusume who overcame the many
challenges of today!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Well... Don't just stand there.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Go on and say something discourteous like,
"There you go again, King." ...You know!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: That's so played out.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: I'm over it already... all of it.

The room grows tense after Seiun Sky's quiet
revelation.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: What do you mean by that?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Oh, not a thing. Let's go home, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Hmm-hm-hmm, hmmm! ♪

Sky is acting carefree as ever, but I have to ask
her about what she said earlier.
choice_data_list:
What did you mean when you said you were
over everything?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Man... Do you have to ask too?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I was just thinking out loud. Both of you are
taking it way too seriously.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Sometimes I just say stuff! Lighten up a little. ☆

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Speaking of "next."

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: I'm interested in that race King mentioned.

After doing a great job in the spring Tenno Sho,
she now wants to show her strength in the autumn
race.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Yeah, that's right.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to run in only the big races. Pretty
impressive, huh?

She's sounding different from the Seiun Sky I
knew before. Her eyes appear fixed on something
distant...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I just remembered, there's something I need to
do. You go on back to the academy first.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: No, don't worry about it.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I'll be super close to my dorm, and you've got
preparations to make.

She doesn't seem willing to open up. It concerns
me, but remembering how motivated she was
during last year's summer camp, I decide to trust
in her.
